inPath.description: InPath is the path to the source directory or file to be archived.

outPath.description: OutPath is the path to the destination tar file to create. If the file already exists, it will be overwritten.

ignore.description: Ignore is a (multiline) string of glob patterns to ignore when adding files to the archive. It accepts the same syntax as .gitignore files.

gzip.description: Gzip determines whether the archive should be compressed using gzip. Defaults to false (the archive is uncompressed unless this is set to true).
